repos.name: iv-cbv-payroll
repos.description: Eligibility Made Easy (Emmy) using Consent-Based Verification (CBV) is a prototype that allows benefit applicants to verify their income directly using payroll providers. It is currently being piloted for testing and validation purposes.

releases.name: deploy/prod/2026-05-28-17-13-11
releases.body:
📝 *Emmy Income only user facing changes*
  • FFS-4272: Add PDF gross pay line items ([#1746](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1746)) - Jake Shilling
🏆 *Emmy CE only user facing changes*
  • FFS-4072: Fix single-month reporting period display ([#1736](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1736)) - Tom Dooner
  • FFS-4073: Users can only add whole numbers for self-attested hours ([#1737](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1737)) - Ben Calegari
  • FFS-4071: Remove flow navigation from NSC sync page ([#1718](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1718)) - Tom Dooner
⚙️ *Other/Maintenance (Not user facing)*
  • Bump aws-sdk-s3 from 1.223.0 to 1.224.0 in /app ([#1751](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1751)) - dependabot[bot]
  • FFS-4437: document manual GitHub release process ([#1734](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1734)) - Nočnica Mellifera
  • Bump webpack from 5.106.2 to 5.107.2 in /app ([#1753](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1753)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump vitest from 4.1.6 to 4.1.7 in /app ([#1750](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1750)) - dependabot[bot]
  • fix: patch Dockerfile for OS-level CVEs flagged by Trivy/Anchore ([#1761](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1761)) - github-actions[bot]
  • Bump vite from 8.0.13 to 8.0.14 in /app ([#1752](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1752)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump sass from 1.99.0 to 1.100.0 in /app ([#1754](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1754)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump css_parser from 1.22.0 to 2.2.0 in /app ([#1755](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1755)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump bootsnap from 1.24.3 to 1.24.5 in /app ([#1756](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1756)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump aws-actionmailer-ses from 1.1.0 to 1.2.0 in /app ([#1757](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1757)) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump newrelic_rpm from 10.4.0 to 10.5.0 in /app ([#1730](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1730)) - dependabot[bot]
  • fix: patch Dockerfile for OS-level CVEs flagged by Trivy/Anchore ([#1745](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1745)) - github-actions[bot]
  • AGENTS.md update ([#1749](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1749)) - Daphne Gold
  • [FFS-4393] Add support for publishing Docker images to Artifactory ([#1748](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1748)) - iannorriswork
releases.author: daphnegold

releases.name: deploy/prod/2026-05-22-10-32-53
releases.body:
:busts_in_silhouette: User facing changes to Emmy Income + Emmy CE
  • No ticket: Allow partially redacted reports to be sent ([#1733](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1733)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1733))) - Tim Miller
  • FFS-4106: Update table and column header content to match designs ([#1726](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1726)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1726))) - Daphne Gold
:memo: Emmy Income only user facing changes
  • No changes, nothing to review!
:trophy: Emmy CE only user facing changes
  • FFS-4044: Add employer information to validated income Review & Submit page ([#1716](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1716)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1716))) - Daphne Gold
:gear: Other/Maintenance (Not user facing)
  • Bump premailer from 1.23.0 to 1.29.0 to fix deprecation warning ([#1735](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1735)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1735))) - Tom Dooner
  • FFS-3666: documentation updates ([#1711](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1711)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1711))) - Nočnica Mellifera
  • Bump idna from 3.10 to 3.15 in /app/analytics in the pip group across 1 directory ([#1724](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1724)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1724))) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump vite from 8.0.12 to 8.0.13 in /app ([#1727](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1727)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1727))) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump postcss from 8.5.14 to 8.5.15 in /app ([#1729](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1729)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1729))) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump aws-sdk-s3 from 1.221.0 to 1.223.0 in /app ([#1731](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1731)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1731))) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump faraday from 2.14.1 to 2.14.2 in /app in the bundler group across 1 directory ([#1717](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1717)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1717))) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump view_component from 4.10.0 to 4.11.0 in /app ([#1728](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1728)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1728))) - dependabot[bot]
  • Bump libc to fix vuln scans ([#1732](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1732)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1732))) - Tom Dooner
  • FFS-4008: Spike: Investigate speeding up our E2E test suite ([#1698](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1698)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1698))) - Ben Calegari
  • Dockerfile autofix PRs include Grype/Anchore fixes ([#1723](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1723)[)](https://github.com/DSACMS/iv-cbv-payroll/pull/1723))) - Ben Calegari
